scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend,admin -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend-admin run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend-admin run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend-admin install
